channel.title: YT Digest Podcast
channel.description: Auto-generated weekly podcast from YouTube subscription transcripts via NotebookLM
channel.itunes:author: YT Digest Pipeline
channel.itunes:summary: Auto-generated weekly podcast from YouTube subscription transcripts via NotebookLM

item.title: 2026-04-23 — Claude Opus Redesign — (Part 2/10)
item.description:
YT Digest for 2026-04-23 — Claude Opus Redesign — (Part 2/10)
Videos covered in this episode:
- Greg Isenberg: Claude Design: Full Walkthrough. I'm blown away. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vyLaimDeK_g) - BridgeMind AI: A new model like Claude Opus 4.7 does not automatically perform better across every category. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pBSXCrNJx2Y) - BridgeMind AI: I had Claude Opus 4.7 redesign the landing page of Bridgemind, and the results show exactly why this (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7JrJeHrYJlE) - BridgeMind AI: See what happens when Claude 4.7 Opus tackles a complete redesign of the Bridge Space command center (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0k3K-Txy80w) - BridgeMind AI: This thirty second marketing video for Bridge Code was built entirely using ReMotion and Claude Opus (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7Ljt3Glj-Bg)
item.itunes:summary:
YT Digest for 2026-04-23 — Claude Opus Redesign — (Part 2/10)
Videos covered in this episode:
- Greg Isenberg: Claude Design: Full Walkthrough. I'm blown away. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vyLaimDeK_g) - BridgeMind AI: A new model like Claude Opus 4.7 does not automatically perform better across every category. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pBSXCrNJx2Y) - BridgeMind AI: I had Claude Opus 4.7 redesign the landing page of Bridgemind, and the results show exactly why this (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7JrJeHrYJlE) - BridgeMind AI: See what happens when Claude 4.7 Opus tackles a complete redesign of the Bridge Space command center (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0k3K-Txy80w) - BridgeMind AI: This thirty second marketing video for Bridge Code was built entirely using ReMotion and Claude Opus (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7Ljt3Glj-Bg)

item.title: 2026-04-23 — Openclaw Agent Hermes — (Part 1/10)
item.description:
YT Digest for 2026-04-23 — Openclaw Agent Hermes — (Part 1/10)
Videos covered in this episode:
- Greg Isenberg: Hermes Agent: The New OpenClaw? (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qn2c_U-cWQs) - AI Jason: Okay, this unleashed my agent (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2zhchG0r6iI) - AI Code King: Qwen 3.6 27B + Hermes,OpenCode,OpenClaw: THIS IS SO GOOD! The BEST LOCAL AI CODER! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SjBBUB1njBc) - AI Code King: OpenClaw SUPER MODE: OpenClaw just got 2X BETTER with this MODE!! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zPzFKigN7lY) - Cole Medin: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow (No Claude Code Bloat) (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XSmI7OYd7iM) - Build Great Products: How to Build ACTUALLY Beautiful Websites With Claude Design & Claude Code (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8GXvgxKPATk)

YT Digest for 2026-04-23 — Openclaw Agent Hermes — (Part 1/10)
